description: Pre-flight oracle for x402 — detect decoys, zombies, and price traps before agents pay.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.sF1nX/x402station

environmentVariables.description: 0x-prefixed 64-hex-char private key. Account must hold Base Sepolia USDC (or Base mainnet after switch). Required for any tool call.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional override. Only https://x402station.io or http(s)://localhost are accepted to prevent payload hijacking; any other value makes the adapter refuse to start.
environmentVariables.name: X402STATION_BASE_URL
